component.name: Incy
component.summary: Cross-platform proxy client built on Xray-core

description.p: Incy is a cross-platform proxy client built on Xray-core. It provides secure network tunneling with support for multiple protocols including Hysteria, Shadowsocks, Sing-box, Trojan, VLESS, VMess, and XRay. The application features a modern GUI built with Compose Multiplatform and bundles a JVM runtime.
This is a community package of Incy and is not officially supported by IT Dev LLC.
